description: Queen Patch 15 (6 July 2020) — Forced Dismount Changes, Mount Balance Changes, Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Forced Dismount Changes

items.text: Players who are force-dismounted, either by mob or player attacks, will now be instantly cleansed and will be temporarily immune to crowd-control effects
This ensures that force-dismounted players can always still activate a skill after getting dismounted, and should prevent perma-stun by attackers

sections.searchable_text: Forced Dismount Changes Players who are force-dismounted, either by mob or player attacks, will now be instantly cleansed and will be temporarily immune to crowd-control effects This ensures that force-dismounted players can always still activate a skill after getting dismounted, and should prevent perma-stun by attackers

sections.heading: Mount Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Mount Balance Changes Horses Time running until gallop: 4s → 3s Gallop Speed Bonus: +5% (additive) Oxen Base Move Speed Bonus: 40% → 50% Giant Stags Time running until gallop: 4s → 2s Swiftclaws Time running until gallop: 4s → 5s Base Move Speed Bonus: 80% → 75% Direwolves Time running until gallop: 4s → 5s

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: Players who re-queue for a zone after being kicked from it via the Smart Cluster Queue will now be immobilized to prevent leaving the queue by wandering away

Replaced some Standard Chests with Veteran Chests in T8 Undead World Boss locations (Unhallowed Cloister, Black Monastery, Deathreach Priory) to better match the Veteran Chest distribution in other factions' T8 World Boss locations
Replaced some Veteran Chests with Standard Chests in Camlann (T7 Undead Royal zone)
Most area-of-effect spells cast by mobs in Hellgates will no longer trigger damage reflection. Affected spells include
[Mobile] Added missing Action Button interactions for Hideouts, Buff Shrines, Furniture Containers and Furniture Repair Kits

sections.searchable_text: Changes Players who re-queue for a zone after being kicked from it via the Smart Cluster Queue will now be immobilized to prevent leaving the queue by wandering away Replaced some Standard Chests with Veteran Chests in T8 Undead World Boss locations (Unhallowed Cloister, Black Monastery, Deathreach Priory) to better match the Veteran Chest distribution in other factions' T8 World Boss locations Replaced some Veteran Chests with Standard Chests in Camlann (T7 Undead Royal zone) Most area-of-effect spells cast by mobs in Hellgates will no longer trigger damage reflection. Affected spells include Magma Explosion Magma Pillar Fiery Rock Inferno Lava [Mobile] Added missing Action Button interactions for Hideouts, Buff Shrines, Furniture Containers and Furniture Repair Kits

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where repair stations displayed repair costs incorrectly due to a rounding error
Additional minor localization, UI, audio, animation, and terrain fixes

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Fixed an issue where repair stations displayed repair costs incorrectly due to a rounding error Additional minor localization, UI, audio, animation, and terrain fixes
